install_command: cd codebase && corepack pnpm install --filter . --filter moltbot-control-ui --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts --no-optional && npm install --prefix .bb-tools @esbuild/linux-x64@0.27.2
info: Local UI task. You do not need a live OpenClaw server or a real browser to reproduce this bug. A fake browser harness that stubs window/history/localStorage/navigator/WebSocket and exercises the vulnerable control-UI startup flow is sufficient.
